decks.notes: The main concept of this deck is to control the game through a combination of counterspells, removal spells, hand disruption, and powerful card draw engines. Glarb, Calamity's Augur serves as the Commander, providing a strong control element to the deck. The deck includes a variety of versatile control spells such as Counterspell, Force of Negation, and Cryptic Command to disrupt opponents' plans. Additionally, there are powerful card advantage engines like Jace, Wielder of Mysteries and Gitaxian Probe to ensure consistency. By efficiently managing threats and resources, the deck aims to outvalue opponents and maintain control over the game until it can secure a win condition, often through a combo involving Demonic Consultation or Doomsday.

This deck focuses on aggressive gameplay with a variety of spells and creatures aimed at controlling the board and overwhelming the opponent. Utilizing the prowess ability of Spider-Man 2099, the deck includes a mix of instants, sorceries, and creatures to disrupt the opponent's strategy while dealing damage quickly. Cards like Lightning Bolt, Force Spike, and True-Name Nemesis help to control the battlefield and pressure the opponent, while spells like Brainstorm and Spell Pierce provide card advantage and protection. The mana base is designed to support the deck's aggressive nature, with a mix of lands to ensure consistent casting of spells and creatures.

The deck focuses on utilizing the abilities of Slimefoot and Squee to create a fast and aggressive board presence. It includes a mix of efficient creatures like Elves of Deep Shadow and Fyndhorn Elves to ramp up mana quickly, along with powerful cards like Birthing Pod and Goblin Bombardment to generate value and control the battlefield. The deck also includes a variety of removal spells like Abrupt Decay and Dismember to deal with threats, as well as disruption in the form of Thoughtseize and Inquisition of Kozilek. With a strong mana base and a focus on creating an overwhelming board presence, the deck aims to pressure opponents early and often to secure a swift victory.

The main idea of this deck is to quickly ramp up mana and play powerful creatures like Ashaya, Soul of the Wild and Emrakul, the Promised End. The deck focuses on using cards like Exploration and Burgeoning to quickly get lands onto the battlefield and accelerate mana production. It also includes ramp cards like Green Sun's Zenith and Primeval Titan to further accelerate the mana advantage. With Lumra, Bellow of the Woods as the commander, the deck can quickly overwhelm opponents with its fast mana production and powerful creatures. The deck also includes cards like Lotus Cobra and Sylvan Safekeeper to protect its creatures and maintain board presence.

The deck focuses on aggressive plays and disrupting the opponent's game plan using Ketramose, the New Dawn as the commander. It includes a mix of cards that enable aggressive strategies like Sorin of House Markov and Grief, along with disruptive cards like Thoughtseize and Hymn to Tourach. The deck also contains removal spells like Swords to Plowshares and Fatal Push to deal with threats. It utilizes a combination of lands like Bojuka Bog and Ghost Vacuum to disrupt the opponent's graveyard strategies while also including cards like Demonic Tutor and Tainted Pact for consistency. Overall, the deck aims to apply pressure early and disrupt the opponent's plans to secure victory.

The deck revolves around ramping quickly and efficiently to establish a strong board presence early in the game. The focus is on generating mana quickly through cards like Exploration, Lotus Cobra, and Utopia Sprawl, allowing you to play powerful threats like Primeval Titan and Emrakul, the Promised End ahead of schedule. The deck also includes a variety of lands that can generate multiple types of mana or have additional utility, such as Maze of Ith and Ghost Quarter. By accelerating your mana production and deploying large threats ahead of schedule, you aim to overwhelm your opponent with a relentless stream of powerful creatures and spells, taking control of the game before they have a chance to respond effectively.

This deck focuses on utilizing Phelia, Exuberant Shepherd as the commander to lead an aggressive strategy. The cards included are geared towards maintaining board control, protecting key creatures, and disrupting opponents' strategies. Cards like Selfless Savior, Giver of Runes, and Mother of Runes help protect valuable creatures, while cards like Recruiter of the Guard and Stoneforge Mystic help search for important pieces of the deck. The deck also includes removal spells like Swords to Plowshares and Parallax Wave to deal with threats efficiently. Overall, the deck aims to establish an early board presence, protect its key pieces, and disrupt opponents' plans to overwhelm them with aggressive creatures and combat tricks.

This aggressive deck focuses on utilizing the partner commanders, Kraum and Yoshimaru, along with a variety of powerful creatures and spells to quickly overwhelm the opponent. By combining red, white, and blue cards, the deck aims to control the board with removal spells like Lightning Bolt and Swords to Plowshares while building a formidable battlefield presence with creatures like Adeline, Resplendent Cathar and Kari Zev, Skyship Raider. The deck also includes powerful equipment like Embercleave and Skullclamp to enhance its creatures' abilities. With a strong emphasis on efficient aggression and creature synergy, this deck aims to quickly assert dominance on the battlefield and disrupt the opponent's game plan.
